purpose: Test whether observer-family geometry exposes measurable failure boundaries under adversarial observer and sample constructions.
pass_condition: collapse_count >= 1 and resisted_count >= 1 and max_attack_score >= 0.80 and mean_attack_score >= 0.20
main_insight: A useful observer geometry should not only pass stability tests; it should also expose measurable collapse regions under adversarial pressure.
limitations: This is not the full OMNIA engine.
This is a toy adversarial geometry experiment.
No universal adversarial robustness claim is made.
